en.eNote: Intake logged 3/7 days (Jun 12: 1,715; Jun 13: 1,517; Jun 14: 1,435). Non-logged days assume the 2,000 kcal plan intake. Monday (Jun 15) in progress.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories. Non-logged days assume 2,000 kcal. Monday (Jun 15) in progress. Avg balance ≈ −944 kcal/day.
en.wNote: Bridge available for days with logged meals (Jun 12–14). Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1: Saturday's trap-bar deadlift was the hardest session: 8.8 t over 11 sets (112 reps), top set 150 kg × 12, max HR 165 — a 150 kg top-set high for the lift.
en.i2t: Avg HR rose across the lifts
en.i2: Avg HR on lifting days climbed 111 (hack) → 109 (squats) → 116 (trap-bar); session max ran 139 (hack) → 148 (squats) → 165 (deadlift). Bands stayed cleanly above RHR (52–58).
en.i3: Friday, Sunday and Monday were off-days around Saturday's deadlift. RHR held 52–53 through the weekend and HRV climbed to 45 (Sat) and 44 (Mon) — recovery is outpacing load.
en.i4: 30.1 t lifted across three sessions (hack 13.2, squat 8.1, trap-bar 8.8) plus a Z2 2.2 km swim. The only off-trend marker was last night's short 5h19 (score 70) after a 00:22 bedtime.
en.rec: Monday is the third straight easy day after Saturday's trap-bar deadlift (8.8 t, 11 sets, 112 reps; avg 116 / max 165, top set 150×12). The week logged 4 sessions, 30.1 t, ~339 kcal/day active burn against a steady deficit (avg −944/day; Sat −1,608). Recovery is mostly green — RHR 53, HRV 44 — but last night ran short at 5h19 (score 70), so keep today genuinely easy: an optional Z2 swim per plan or full rest, and refuel toward 2,000. Next: Tuesday hack squat.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-09 → 2026-06-15 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.eNote: Unos zabilježen 3/7 dana (12.6.: 1.715; 13.6.: 1.517; 14.6.: 1.435). Dani bez zapisa pretpostavljaju planski unos 2.000 kcal. Ponedjeljak (15.6.) u tijeku.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije. Dani bez zapisa pretpostavljaju 2.000 kcal. Ponedjeljak (15.6.) u tijeku. Prosj. bilanca ≈ −944 kcal/dan.
hr.wNote: Most dostupan za dane sa zabilježenim obrocima (12.–14.6.). Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1: Subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje bilo je najteži trening: 8,8 t kroz 11 serija (112 ponavljanja), završna serija 150 kg × 12, maks puls 165 — rekord završne serije od 150 kg za tu vježbu.
hr.i2: Prosj. puls na danima dizanja rastao 111 (hack) → 109 (čučanj) → 116 (trap-bar); maks treninga 139 (hack) → 148 (čučanj) → 165 (mrtvo dizanje). Zone ostale čisto iznad RHR-a (52–58).
hr.i3: Petak, nedjelja i ponedjeljak bili su slobodni dani oko subotnjeg mrtvog dizanja. RHR držao 52–53 kroz vikend, a HRV rastao na 45 (sub) i 44 (pon) — oporavak nadmašuje opterećenje.
hr.i4: 30,1 t podignuto kroz tri treninga (hack 13,2, čučanj 8,1, trap-bar 8,8) plus Z2 plivanje 2,2 km. Jedini pokazatelj izvan trenda bila je sinoćnja kratka noć 5h19 (ocjena 70) nakon odlaska na spavanje u 00:22.
hr.rec: Ponedjeljak je treći zaredom lagan dan nakon subotnjeg trap-bar mrtvog dizanja (8,8 t, 11 serija, 112 ponavljanja; prosj. 116 / maks 165, završna 150×12). Tjedan zabilježio 4 treninga, 30,1 t, ~339 kcal/dan aktivno uz stabilan deficit (prosj. −944/dan; sub −1.608). Oporavak je uglavnom zelen — RHR 53, HRV 44 — ali sinoć je bilo kratko, 5h19 (ocjena 70), pa neka danas bude stvarno lagano: opcionalno Z2 plivanje po planu ili potpuni odmor, i nadoknadi gorivo prema 2.000. Sljedeće: utorak hack squat.
hr.foot: Podaci: 9.6. → 15.6.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
